name: strata
description: Local-first AI codebase explainer — onboarding from months to days

scripts.test: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:parallel && npm run test:trackcd && npm run test:git && npm run test:regressions && npm run test:mcp
scripts.test:mcp: npm run build && tsx tests/mcp-smoke.ts && tsx tests/mcp-jit.ts && tsx tests/mcp-watcher.ts && tsx tests/mcp-trackcd.ts
